phase1.task_description:
Requests should be able to specify the subPath in addition to partition and name
In order to service the issue https://github.com/F5Networks/f5-common-python/issues/468, the icontrolsession needs to be able to support a subPath keyword argument to requests. This allows a consumer to get access to an object created in an iapp or an object in the drafts folder (in BIG-IP 12.1).

critical_error.impact_analysis: The agent encountered multiple test timeouts, indicating that the changes made did not resolve the underlying issue or caused new issues that were not caught in time.
critical_error.counterfactual_reasoning: If the agent had successfully added the subPath keyword argument to the icontrolsession without causing any immediate errors, it would have continued with further testing and validation of the changes.
